column1: # Question hints — when the prompt matches any of these (or ends with `?` /
# `？` / 吗 / 呢, handled directly in do_it_prompt_is_question), the router
# keeps a genuinely discussion-shaped turn at Light. A concrete task request
# Punctuation-only sentinels (?, ？, 吗, 呢) live in code (do_it_prompt_is_question)
# rather than this table because grep -wF would not match a non-word-character
